project.name: consulting-revenue-platform-api
project.description: Production-style, multi-tenant Go API for time tracking, invoicing, Stripe-backed payments, and financial reconciliation.

owner_profile_context.target_outcome: Portfolio-quality backend project that demonstrates direct business impact and production readiness.

execution.recommended_method: Parallelize by category after dependencies are satisfied; each story has explicit acceptance and test requirements.
definition_of_done: All stories marked done with all acceptance criteria satisfied.
All tests passing in CI: unit, integration, migration, and security checks.
Tenant isolation tests passing for all tenant-scoped endpoints.
Idempotency and webhook replay tests passing.
OpenAPI docs and README updated to reflect implemented behavior.
global_constraints: All tenant-scoped business tables include organization_id.
All tenant-scoped queries enforce organization_id filtering.
Mutating endpoints require authentication and authorization.
Money values are stored as integer minor units; no floating-point arithmetic for currency.
All logs must avoid secrets and unnecessary PII.
Standard API error envelope is used everywhere.

agent_rules: Do not proceed on a story until dependencies are complete.
Update API docs and tests in the same PR as code changes.
For schema changes, include up/down migrations and integration tests.
When uncertain, favor secure defaults and explicit validation.

categories.name: Platform Foundation
categories.description: Bootstrap core runtime, configuration, migrations, middleware, and error contracts.

categories.name: Identity, Tenancy, and RBAC
categories.description: Implement secure authentication, tenant resolution, and role-based authorization.

categories.name: Clients, Projects, and Time Tracking
categories.description: Implement tenant-scoped business entities and time-entry workflows.

categories.name: Invoicing
categories.description: Generate, manage, and render invoices from approved work.

categories.name: Payments and Reconciliation
categories.description: Integrate Stripe payment flows with reliable webhook processing and reconciliation.

categories.name: Ledger, Audit, and Reporting
categories.description: Track immutable financial events and provide key financial reports.

categories.name: Production Readiness and Operations
categories.description: Add queueing, health, observability, CI, and runtime hardening.

categories.name: Security, Privacy, and Compliance Controls
categories.description: Cross-cutting controls for data protection, authorization hardening, and retention.

categories.name: Documentation and Developer Experience
categories.description: OpenAPI, seed data, and runbooks to make the project easy to use and review.

stories.title: Initialize Go project skeleton and app entrypoint
stories.description: Set up module, package layout, app bootstrap, and baseline make targets.
scope: Create Go module and conventional folder structure: cmd, internal, migrations, docs, scripts.
Add app entrypoint in cmd/api with dependency injection scaffolding.
Add Makefile targets: run, test, lint, migrate-up, migrate-down.
out_of_scope: Feature endpoint implementation beyond basic health route.
implementation_notes: Use explicit constructor functions for components to avoid global state.
Introduce interface boundaries where external providers will be injected later.
security_privacy: App should fail fast if required secure settings are absent in non-dev environments.
edge_cases: Process receives shutdown signal during startup.
acceptance_criteria: Application starts and responds 200 on /healthz.
Makefile targets execute without missing command errors.
test_plan: Unit test bootstrap config wiring.
Integration test /healthz route.
deliverables: Initial health route and startup wiring.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Implement configuration loader and environment contract
stories.description: Load typed configuration from env vars with required/optional semantics and safe defaults.
scope: Add typed config package and startup validation.
Create .env.example with documented keys.
implementation_notes: Use centralized config struct with nested domains (db, auth, stripe, observability).
security_privacy: Never log secret values.
Reject startup when required production secrets are missing.
edge_cases: Missing optional values should fallback to explicit defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Clear startup errors list missing required keys.
.env.example includes all required keys with descriptions.
test_plan: Table-driven parsing tests for valid and invalid env sets.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Add PostgreSQL connectivity and migration runner
stories.description: Provide DB pool setup and migration execution tooling.
scope: Initialize DB pool with sensible limits and timeouts.
Add migration runner command and Makefile integration.
implementation_notes: Expose DB health check used by readiness endpoint in later story.
security_privacy: Enable TLS mode configuration for DB connections.
Avoid logging full DSN if it contains credentials.
edge_cases: Migration partially fails; ensure transaction/rollback behavior is documented.
acceptance_criteria: migrate-up and migrate-down run successfully.
Startup fails gracefully when DB unreachable.
test_plan: Integration test against disposable Postgres instance.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Implement core HTTP middleware chain
stories.description: Set up request ID, panic recovery, timeout, and request logging middleware.
scope: Generate or propagate request IDs.
Recover from panics and return sanitized error responses.
Enforce request timeout.
implementation_notes: Order middleware deliberately: request ID -> recovery -> timeout -> logging.
security_privacy: Do not expose panic stack traces in client responses.
Logging must redact authorization headers.
acceptance_criteria: All responses include request ID.
Panics return standardized 500 without internals.
test_plan: Middleware unit tests for panic/timeout behavior.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Standardize API error envelope and response helpers
stories.description: Create canonical success/error response shapes and reusable error mapping.
scope: Define API error codes and HTTP mapping.
Build helper functions for JSON success/error writes.
implementation_notes: Map domain errors to API codes centrally to avoid inconsistent status responses.
security_privacy: Never pass raw SQL errors to clients.
acceptance_criteria: All handlers return consistent error format.
Validation errors include field-level details.
test_plan: Handler tests for each major error code path.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Create users, organizations, memberships schema
stories.description: Introduce core identity and tenant schema for multi-tenancy.
scope: Create users table with case-insensitive email uniqueness.
Create organizations table as tenant root.
Create memberships linking users to organizations with role and status.
implementation_notes: Use UUID primary keys.
Add created_at and updated_at columns.
security_privacy: Store password hashes only, never plaintext.
edge_cases: User belongs to multiple orgs with different roles.
acceptance_criteria: Schema migration applies and rolls back cleanly.
Constraints prevent duplicate memberships.
test_plan: Migration integration tests for constraints.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Implement registration endpoint with secure password handling
stories.description: Allow user registration and default tenant creation.
scope: POST /auth/register with email/password/full_name.
Create default organization and owner membership.
implementation_notes: Use bcrypt or argon2 with calibrated cost factor.
security_privacy: Use generic error messaging for duplicate/invalid credentials to reduce user enumeration.
Enforce password complexity and minimum length.
edge_cases: Email case variants should resolve to same user uniqueness.
acceptance_criteria: Valid registration creates user, organization, and owner membership in one transaction.
Duplicate email registration fails with standardized error.
test_plan: Unit tests for validation.
Integration test for transactional creation.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Implement login, refresh rotation, and logout
stories.description: Authenticate users and manage short-lived access tokens with rotating refresh tokens.
scope: POST /auth/login
POST /auth/refresh
POST /auth/logout
Persist hashed refresh tokens with metadata.
implementation_notes: Rotate refresh token on every refresh and invalidate prior token.
Track token family to detect replay.
security_privacy: Hash refresh tokens at rest.
On replay detection, revoke full token family.
edge_cases: Concurrent refresh calls with same token.
acceptance_criteria: Access and refresh tokens issued on login.
Refresh token cannot be reused after rotation.
Logout revokes active session token.
test_plan: Integration tests for refresh replay and revocation.
deliverables: Auth session schema and token management logic.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Implement auth middleware and active tenant resolution
stories.description: Resolve user identity and active organization per request.
scope: JWT verification middleware.
Active organization selection via header or path param.
Membership existence and status checks.
out_of_scope: Automatic org fallback selection UI behavior.
implementation_notes: Inject auth context with user_id, organization_id, role into request context.
security_privacy: Reject if user is not active member of requested organization.
edge_cases: User has access to multiple organizations.
acceptance_criteria: Protected routes reject missing/invalid tokens.
Cross-tenant access attempts are denied.
test_plan: Middleware tests for valid/invalid auth and org membership.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Add role-based authorization policy engine
stories.description: Centralize authorization checks for owner, accountant, and contractor roles.
scope: Define role-permission matrix for all existing endpoints.
Add authorization guard utility to handlers/services.
implementation_notes: Default deny when permission mapping missing.
security_privacy: Authorization checks must happen before data retrieval wherever feasible.
edge_cases: Role changed while token is still valid.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoints enforce role capabilities consistently.
Unauthorized actions return standardized forbidden errors.
test_plan: Policy matrix tests across all roles and actions.
deliverables: Authorization policy module and test matrix.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Membership management APIs
stories.description: Manage membership invites, role changes, and removals.
scope: Endpoints to list, invite/add, change role, and remove members.
Enforce owner-only role changes and removals.
implementation_notes: Prevent deletion or demotion of last remaining owner.
security_privacy: Do not disclose membership info to non-authorized roles.
edge_cases: Attempt to remove self as last owner.
acceptance_criteria: Last-owner protection enforced.
Membership lifecycle transitions work correctly.
test_plan: Integration tests for last-owner and permission checks.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Client CRUD with tenant scoping and soft delete
stories.description: Implement client management endpoints for organizations.
scope: Create, list, retrieve, update, soft-delete clients.
Support filtering by active status.
implementation_notes: Default list excludes soft-deleted clients.
Use organization_id+id filtering for all CRUD.
security_privacy: Validate and normalize billing emails.
Avoid exposing deleted records unless explicitly requested by authorized roles.
edge_cases: Delete client with active projects (should be blocked or require force behavior definition).
acceptance_criteria: Client CRUD works only within active organization.
Soft-deleted clients no longer appear in default lists.
test_plan: Tenant isolation tests.
Soft-delete behavior tests.
deliverables: Client schema, API, service, and tests.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Project CRUD with client linkage validation
stories.description: Implement project management linked to clients and billing settings.

Project references a client in the same organization.
implementation_notes: Enforce valid billing modes with enum/check constraint.
security_privacy: Reject cross-tenant client reference at write time.
edge_cases: Archived project cannot receive new time entries.
acceptance_criteria: Project CRUD with valid tenant and client linkage.
Archived status blocks future active use where expected.
test_plan: Linkage and status validation tests.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Time entry CRUD with lifecycle states
stories.description: Implement time entry creation and edits with status controls.
scope: Create, update, list time entries.
State machine: draft, submitted, approved, invoiced.
implementation_notes: Store duration in integer minutes.
Prevent edits to approved/invoiced entries unless explicitly unlocked by authorized role.
security_privacy: Contractors should only edit their own draft entries unless policy says otherwise.
acceptance_criteria: Valid entries can be created and listed with filters.
Invalid state edits are blocked with clear errors.

Validation tests for bounds and required fields.
deliverables: Time entry schema, service logic, and APIs.

stories.title: Time entry submission and approval workflow
stories.description: Implement explicit submit, approve, and reject transitions with role rules.
scope: Submit endpoint for contractors.
Approve/reject endpoints for owner/accountant.
implementation_notes: Record approver/reviewer metadata and timestamps.

edge_cases: Approving already approved entry should be idempotent or explicit conflict.

stories.title: Time entry list filtering, cursor pagination, and bulk actions

acceptance_criteria: Pagination stable and deterministic under repeated calls.

stories.title: Invoice schema with per-organization numbering
stories.description: Introduce invoice and line item schema with transactional numbering.
scope: Create invoices and invoice_line_items tables.

edge_cases: Concurrent invoice creation in same organization.
acceptance_criteria: Invoice numbers unique and monotonic per org under concurrency.
test_plan: Concurrency integration test for numbering.

stories.title: Generate invoice from approved uninvoiced time entries
stories.description: Create invoice generation workflow from approved work within a date range.

Mark source entries linked/invoiced atomically.
implementation_notes: Use transaction to avoid race conditions and duplicate inclusion.

stories.title: Draft invoice line item editing and total recomputation
stories.description: Allow line item edits for draft invoices only with server-side total computation.
scope: Add/edit/remove line items for draft invoices.
Recompute subtotal/tax/total server-side.
implementation_notes: Clients should not submit invoice totals; totals are derived and persisted by backend.
security_privacy: Lock editing when invoice status is sent/paid/void.
edge_cases: Negative line item amounts should be constrained by policy.
acceptance_criteria: Line item updates accepted only for draft invoices.
Totals remain consistent and deterministic.
test_plan: Unit tests for recalculation logic and rounding.

stories.title: Currency and rounding rules for USD/JPY
stories.description: Implement deterministic money representation and currency-specific precision.
scope: Store amount_minor and currency on all monetary records.
Enforce JPY zero-decimal and USD cent precision rules.
implementation_notes: Expose helper methods for formatting display amounts while preserving minor-unit storage.
security_privacy: Disallow cross-currency arithmetic without explicit conversion logic.
acceptance_criteria: All money calculations pass precision tests with no float usage.
test_plan: Comprehensive unit tests for currency behavior.
deliverables: Money utility package and integration into invoice flow.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Send invoice workflow and immutable sent-state behavior

stories.title: Invoice PDF rendering and secure document access

stories.title: Create Stripe payment link for sent invoices
stories.description: Create checkout/payment link for invoices and persist external reference.

stories.title: Implement Stripe webhook receiver with signature verification

scope: POST /webhooks/stripe endpoint.
Signature verification and storage in webhook_events table.

security_privacy: Verify Stripe signature using webhook signing secret.
Rate limit webhook endpoint to reduce abuse.
acceptance_criteria: Valid signed events are persisted and acknowledged.
Invalid signature returns error and does not persist.
test_plan: Signature verification tests using test vectors.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Build idempotent webhook processing worker
stories.description: Process stored webhook events in background with retries and deduplication.
scope: Queue worker that loads unprocessed events and applies handlers.
Idempotency guard by provider event ID.
implementation_notes: Use transactional update marking processed_at only after successful reconciliation.
security_privacy: Do not log full webhook payloads in production by default.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate events do not create duplicate payments.
Failed events are retried and eventually dead-lettered per policy.
test_plan: Replay tests using same event multiple times.
Retry/backoff tests.

state_machine.completion_rule: status can become done only after merged and all acceptance criteria checked in PR.

stories.title: Reconcile Stripe payment outcomes with invoice state
stories.description: Apply payment success/failure outcomes to invoices and payments tables.

Update invoice statuses and payment records.
implementation_notes: Validate currency matches invoice currency before applying payment.

security_privacy: Prevent unauthorized manual state changes bypassing reconciliation.
acceptance_criteria: Successful payments transition eligible invoices to paid.
Currency mismatch causes safe failure and audit trail.
test_plan: Event-driven reconciliation integration tests.
deliverables: Reconciliation logic and state transition enforcement.

stories.title: Refund and payment failure event handling
stories.description: Handle refunds and terminal failure events with legal state transitions.

implementation_notes: Represent refunds as separate ledger/payment adjustments to preserve history.
security_privacy: Disallow negative total anomalies caused by repeated refund events.
acceptance_criteria: Refund events update financial state accurately and idempotently.

deliverables: Refund event handling in reconciliation worker.

stories.title: Implement immutable financial ledger entries
stories.description: Create append-only ledger table for major financial transitions.
scope: Add ledger_entries schema and write paths for invoice/payment transitions.
No update/delete operations for ledger data.
implementation_notes: Use typed event_type values for easy audit/reporting.

edge_cases: Backfill/reconciliation corrections should append compensating entries.

stories.title: Implement audit log for security and business actions
stories.description: Track actor-action-target events with redacted change summaries.

security_privacy: Redact sensitive fields: passwords, tokens, secrets, raw webhook signatures.
edge_cases: System-initiated actions without direct user actor.
acceptance_criteria: Audit events present for all required action types.

Paid this month endpoint.

security_privacy: Only accountant/owner can access reporting endpoints.
edge_cases: No data scenarios should return zero values, not errors.
acceptance_criteria: Reports return correct aggregates and enforce tenant boundaries.

stories.title: CSV export endpoints with injection-safe formatting
stories.description: Export key records as CSV while preventing spreadsheet formula injection.
scope: CSV export for invoices, payments, and time summaries.

implementation_notes: Stable column order and UTF-8 encoding are required.
security_privacy: Prefix cells starting with =,+,-,@ to mitigate formula injection.
edge_cases: Large exports should stream response instead of buffering whole dataset.
acceptance_criteria: CSV output is valid, stable, and safe from formula injection.

deliverables: CSV export handlers and safety utilities.

stories.title: Introduce background job framework with retries and dead-lettering
stories.description: Provide durable async processing for webhooks and retryable tasks.

implementation_notes: Choose a queue library appropriate for PostgreSQL/Redis and local development simplicity.
security_privacy: Do not place secrets in queue payloads.
acceptance_criteria: Retry policy works with capped attempts and dead-letter storage.
test_plan: Worker retry simulation tests.

stories.title: Implement health, readiness, and liveness probes

stories.title: Authorization regression suite across tenants and roles
stories.description: Build explicit negative tests for IDOR and permission bypass scenarios.
scope: Test cross-tenant data access attempts on all major entity endpoints.
Test role escalation and forbidden action attempts.
implementation_notes: Use test helpers for organization fixtures and mixed-role users.
security_privacy: Focus on IDOR prevention and consistent authorization response behavior.
edge_cases: Valid entity ID from different organization.
Stale token where role was downgraded.
acceptance_criteria: All cross-tenant access attempts fail.
Forbidden role actions fail consistently.
test_plan: Automated regression matrix executed in CI.

stories.title: Threat model and security controls mapping document
stories.description: Document primary threats and mapped controls implemented in code.
scope: Create threat model doc with abuse scenarios.
Map each threat to prevention/detection controls and tests.
implementation_notes: Cover webhook spoofing, replay, token theft, SQL injection, CSV injection, tenant breakout.
security_privacy: Document residual risks and operational mitigations.
edge_cases: Unknown unknowns acknowledged with periodic review guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Threat model reviewed and linked from README.
test_plan: N/A (documentation story).

stories.title: Data retention and deletion workflows
stories.description: Define and implement retention for logs/webhook payloads and deletion flows.
scope: Retention job for stale operational data where legally permissible.
Soft-delete workflows for users/orgs with accounting record preservation rules.
out_of_scope: Automated legal policy engine per jurisdiction.
implementation_notes: Make retention windows configurable by environment.
security_privacy: Preserve financial records while minimizing unnecessary personal data retention.
edge_cases: Attempted deletion where legal retention obligations apply.
acceptance_criteria: Retention job deletes/archives only eligible records.
Org deactivation flow preserves required accounting data.
test_plan: Retention eligibility and deactivation behavior tests.

acceptance_criteria: Spec lints successfully in CI.

stories.title: Seed data and local demo bootstrap
stories.description: Provide deterministic sample data for demos and integration testing.
scope: Seed command creates demo org, users, clients, projects, entries, invoices.
Provide reset option for repeatable demo runs.
implementation_notes: Use fake names/domains only.
security_privacy: No real PII in seed artifacts.
edge_cases: Re-running seed should not duplicate unique entities unexpectedly.
acceptance_criteria: Single command produces working demo state.
Seed is idempotent or has clear reset semantics.
test_plan: Seed command integration test.
